title: Duplicate Finder
description: Select multiple files, hash with local SHA-256, group identical content; mark keep / delete and export a cleanup report
disclaimer: Everything runs locally in your browser (Web Crypto + size pre-filter). Files are only read for hashing, never uploaded. After choosing what to keep, use your OS to delete the rest.

drop.tip: Pre-grouped by file size; only same-size files get SHA-256 hashed to avoid waste

emptyHint: Drop files to start scanning for duplicates
